What's up everybody? Alright, so we are going to go through acuity right now and pretty easy similar to the last play. All we got to do is sign into your acuity account and then if you have extra calendars you can create extra calendars and name them accordingly to each one or you could use one that you're not currently using if you have more than one but if you have just one calendar I recommend upgrading and getting the plan that allows you at six I believe is the next step up and once you do that you can make one for each member monetization play. Now for the regular weekly hours this isn't necessarily the hours of your gym it's the hours that you want to be taking in meetings for the either if you're doing the bring a friend challenge or the big booty boot camp whatever it is so you want to set those accordingly and then you can leave that there and if you wanted to block certain days off you could do that over here and then if you go into settings you can also change how many people can be in each meeting so each scheduled meeting four is about a good number but if you want to do a group presentation you can go ahead and do that so once you have that squared away it's the same thing to find the embedded scheduler you just go over here client scheduling page and then embed scheduler copy and you just paste it in your click funnels on the thank you page so that's all there is to it.
